response.justification: Candidate has 13+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ year requirement, with current role at re:cinq directly involving TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure (MCP code generators) that aligns precisely with the AI agent development requirement. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, DLang, C++), demonstrated TDD/craftsmanship practices, React and MongoDB experience from Optilyz, and AWS/Docker/Kubernetes exposure cover most of the stack. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js or Vitest mention, and React depth is limited to one role, but the overall engineering caliber and AI-tooling relevance make this a strong interview candidate.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current re:cinq role matches a key requirement
Polyglot senior engineer with TDD/craftsmanship discipline and 13+ years across web, backend, and infrastructure
Hands-on with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS CDK, Docker, and Kubernetes from Optilyz and GISCollective
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
No mention of Vitest, Jest, or Playwright despite testing-focused background
React exposure appears limited to a single role; frontend depth relative to backend is unclear

key_factors.factor: Seniority and polyglot full-stack track record
Missing Nest.js and named testing frameworks
